title: BlockVantage
description: Successfully Blocking an Attack with a shield Gives you a Huge buff for Small Duration.
body:
Blocking Attack Successfully Will Give you:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Speed I I for 2 Seconds
- Strength V for 3 Seconds
- Resistance V for 3 Seconds

_**(Effects Dont Stack)**_

</details>
